buildARingFarmCodes.title: Build A Ring Farm Codes
buildARingFarmCodes.intro: Use the latest Build A Ring Farm codes for free boosts, then redeem them before they rotate out in future updates.

steps.title: Redeem 100KVISITS
steps.description: Reward: 5 Minute Time Skip. Use it when your farm queue is full to skip waiting and cash out faster.

steps.title: Redeem 2KLIKES
steps.description: Reward: 1 Tropical Seed Pack. Open this early to accelerate your seed progression and early crop value.

steps.title: Redeem UPDATE1
steps.description: Reward: 3 Strong Fertilizers. Save these for better-value crops to get stronger returns.

steps.title: Check Expired Codes
steps.description: No expired Build A Ring Farm codes are listed yet. Re-check this module after each update cycle.

quickTips: Complete the tutorial before code redemption.
Paste codes exactly as listed with no extra spaces.
If a code fails, rejoin another server and try again.
Redeem active codes as soon as possible to avoid missing rewards.

buildARingFarmBeginnerGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Beginner Guide
buildARingFarmBeginnerGuide.intro: This Build A Ring Farm beginner route focuses on efficient early growth: plant, harvest, sell, and reinvest into expansion.

cards.name: Finish Tutorial Fast
cards.description: Clear the onboarding flow first to unlock code redemption and core farm actions.

cards.name: Plant Every Plot
cards.description: Keep plots active at all times so your cash loop starts scaling immediately.

cards.name: Sell Frequently
cards.description: Quick sell cycles fund seed upgrades faster than waiting for oversized batches.

cards.name: Reinvest in Expansion
cards.description: Use early earnings on expansion and practical upgrades before luxury spending.

buildARingFarmMutationsTierList.title: Build A Ring Farm Mutations Tier List
buildARingFarmMutationsTierList.intro: Mutation priority in Build A Ring Farm is driven by multiplier value, event chance, and how quickly you can apply it to strong crops.

items.name: Rainbow
items.description: Top-end multiplier from Galaxy events. Best long-term target for premium crops.

items.name: Radioactive
items.description: Strong late-game option with excellent return while chasing Rainbow.

items.name: Void
items.description: Reliable mid-to-late mutation that scales well on higher-value harvests.

items.name: Frozen
items.description: Solid bridge mutation when better options are not available.

items.name: Wet
items.description: Most accessible early mutation and great for starter income momentum.

buildARingFarmSeedsAndCropsGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Seeds and Crops Guide
buildARingFarmSeedsAndCropsGuide.intro: Build A Ring Farm crop growth depends on seed quality, event timing, and keeping your best plots active for mutation windows.

solutions.name: Tropical Seed Pack
solutions.description: Redeem from 2KLIKES and open early to improve initial crop outcomes.

solutions.name: Strong Fertilizer
solutions.description: Apply to crops you want to level and keep in your main farming cycle.

solutions.name: Void Fruit Path
solutions.description: Use it as a progression anchor once your farm economy is stable.

solutions.name: Tomato Seed Goal
solutions.description: The high price makes it a strong checkpoint for income scaling.

managementTips: Buy seeds in step with your current cash flow.
Do not overcommit fertilizer on low-value crops.
Keep premium crops active during event windows.
Upgrade seed quality before vanity spending.

buildARingFarmGearShopGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Gear Shop Guide
buildARingFarmGearShopGuide.intro: The Build A Ring Farm Gear Shop is strongest after your farm cash flow is stable. Sprays apply direct mutation boosts, and code rewards provide free progression support in early sessions.

items.bestUse: Start here when you need a low-cost mutation boost.
Use after your farm can absorb larger upgrade spending.
Strong mid-to-late option for valuable crops.
Best on premium plants where the high cost is justified.
Save for your highest-value crop for max returns.
Clear weak mutations before trying for better rolls.

items.effect: Speeds farm progression after redeeming rewards
items.bestUse: Use early when you need to reach your next upgrade target.

buildARingFarmMoneyFarmingGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Money Farming Guide
buildARingFarmMoneyFarmingGuide.intro: Build A Ring Farm rewards active reinvestment. Keep crops moving, convert rewards into momentum, and prioritize upgrades that scale each harvest loop.

items.title: Plant and harvest continuously
items.action: Keep every plot active, harvest on time, and sell for cash without long idle gaps.
items.whyItWorks: The core loop is built around repeated grow, harvest, sell, upgrade, and expand cycles.

items.title: Redeem free starter rewards
items.action: Use active codes like 100KVISITS, 2KLIKES, and UPDATE1 for Time Skip, seed packs, and fertilizer boosts.
items.whyItWorks: Free rewards accelerate early growth before your farm has strong natural income.

items.title: Reinvest cash into scaling upgrades
items.action: Buy seeds, machinery, sprinklers, saws, and expansion instead of stockpiling currency.
items.whyItWorks: Upgrade-based scaling raises total output and unlocks bigger expansion milestones.

items.title: Expand when output is stable
items.action: Purchase more plots once your current ring area is generating consistent cash flow.
items.whyItWorks: More active plots increase total harvest volume per cycle.

items.title: Use fertilizer at progression breakpoints
items.action: Spend Strong Fertilizers when they can help you unlock the next major upgrade sooner.
items.whyItWorks: Timing limited boosts around upgrade gates improves overall efficiency.

items.title: Prioritize mutated high-value crops
items.action: Focus event and spray boosts on your strongest crops before spending effort on weaker plots.
items.whyItWorks: Mutations multiply value most when applied to already-profitable crops.

items.title: Stay online during weather events
items.action: Remain in-game when Rain, Blizzard, Black Hole, Nuclear, and Galaxy events trigger.
items.whyItWorks: Event mutation rolls only happen while you are actively online.

items.title: Use offline earnings as support income
items.action: Collect offline gains, then reinvest immediately into upgrades and expansion plans.
items.whyItWorks: Offline income helps, but active mutation timing still drives faster growth.

buildARingFarmWeatherEventsGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Weather Events Guide
buildARingFarmWeatherEventsGuide.intro: Build A Ring Farm weather events are a free path to mutation multipliers. Rarer events usually give stronger returns, so timing matters.

items.playerTip: Best early event because it has the highest listed chance.
A useful step up when it lands on a strong crop.
Strong event mutation for valuable crops and scaling routes.
Low chance but excellent payoff when applied to top crops.
Highest-value event mutation with the rarest listed odds.

items.incomeMultiplier: No event mutation gain while offline
items.playerTip: Offline earnings continue, but event mutations require online presence.

faq.title: Build A Ring Farm
faq.subtitle: Common player questions for Build A Ring Farm progression

questions.question: How do I redeem Build A Ring Farm codes?
questions.answer: Open settings in Build A Ring Farm, paste a code into the code box, and press Redeem after finishing the tutorial.

questions.question: What is the best early strategy in Build A Ring Farm?
questions.answer: In Build A Ring Farm, keep plots active, sell often, and reinvest into expansion and practical upgrade paths.

questions.question: Which mutation is best in Build A Ring Farm?
questions.answer: Build A Ring Farm Rainbow mutation has the highest multiplier, while Wet mutation is the easiest early option.

questions.question: Does Build A Ring Farm have offline income?
questions.answer: Yes, Build A Ring Farm continues earning while offline, and frequent collection improves reinvestment speed.
